sections.title: A: Original passage gap fill practice
sections.instructions: Complete the original passage using the best answers for the gaps.
sections.passage:
Original passage for Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28

Mia joined a class project because the group wanted fresh practice for passage gap fill practice. The tutor wrote (1) ...... (2) ...... (3) ...... (4) ...... (5) ...... on the board and asked everyone to explain their choices. Later, the group compared (6) ...... (7) ...... (8) ...... (9) ...... (10) ...... with the rule from the lesson. The text is new, but it practises the same passage gap fill.

sections.title: D: Original matching practice
sections.instructions: Match each original prompt with the correct ending.

items.sentence: During the class project on Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28, Mia wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: D – down and 400 people have lost their jobs.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: A – in for him while he went into town.

items.sentence: Sara checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: F – to the orders while he spoke to a customer.

items.sentence: The online lesson included a short sentence about Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: C – over Cookright and plan to close some branches.

items.sentence: During the school club on Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28, Nina wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: G – out to become a millionaire - it just happened!

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 14 – Units 27 & 28, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: B – out a new flavour of ice cream next month.

items.sentence: Iris checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: E – up a business selling my own jewellery.
